image:image.image:title: Leverra Sri Damansara — Freehold Pre-Sale Condominium Hero View
image:image.image:caption: Leverra Sri Damansara freehold pre-sale condominium 500m to MRT in Bandar Sri Damansara, Kuala Lumpur.

image:image.image:title: Leverra Sri Damansara Skyline Tower Rendering
image:image.image:caption: Tower rendering showing the skyline presence of Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:title: Leverra Sri Damansara Masterplan and Location
image:image.image:caption: Masterplan and location overview of Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:title: Leverra Sri Damansara Night Lifestyle View
image:image.image:caption: Night lifestyle view of the Leverra Sri Damansara development.

image:image.image:title: Easy Highway Access from Leverra Sri Damansara
image:image.image:caption: Easy access to LDP, NKVE and DUKE highways from Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:title: 50m Lap Pool at Leverra Sri Damansara
image:image.image:caption: Resort-style 50m lap swimming pool facility at Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:title: Leverra Sri Damansara Lifestyle Facilities
image:image.image:caption: Lifestyle gallery and resident facilities at Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:title: Senses Park at Leverra Sri Damansara
image:image.image:caption: Landscaped Senses Park area at Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:title: Lush Landscaped Garden at Leverra Sri Damansara
image:image.image:caption: Lush landscaped garden surroundings at Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:title: Covered MRT Walkway from Leverra Sri Damansara
image:image.image:caption: Covered pedestrian walkway connecting Leverra to Sri Damansara West MRT station.

image:image.image:title: Leverra Sri Damansara — Type A 2-Bedroom Layout
image:image.image:caption: Type A 2-bedroom 728 sqft floor plan at Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:title: Leverra Sri Damansara — Type B 3-Bedroom Layout
image:image.image:caption: Type B 3-bedroom 903 sqft floor plan at Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:caption: Type C 4-bedroom 1145 sqft floor plan at Leverra Sri Damansara.

image:image.image:caption: Detailed floor plan overview for Leverra Sri Damansara residences.
